key_risks: Semiconductor volatility (SMH 70% annualized vol, beta 2.23) could sharply reverse if AI sentiment turns or Micron strength is already priced in
July CPI/PPI and FOMC (Jul 28-29) could trigger rate-driven equity drawdown given still-elevated 3.4% core PCE
Biotech and semis are at/near 52w highs implying reversal/profit-taking risk
Cyclicals (industrials/financials) vulnerable if July jobs report or ISM disappoints

portfolio.rationale: Micron's blowout Q3 (revenue $41.5B vs $9.3B yr-ago) and guide to $50B Q4 with ~86% margins confirm a memory supercycle with demand ahead of supply through 2027; HBM4 in high-volume shipment. Strong sector tailwind into July; positive 30d benchmark-relative.

Defensive sector with strong recent breadth (up_day_share 63%), low beta (0.38), at 52w highs, strongest 7d/30d among defensives. Offers diversification with positive momentum and limited macro sensitivity into CPI/FOMC.
Manufacturing PMI at 59-month high (55.7) and durable goods ex-transport up 1.3% support cyclical industrials; +7.6% benchmark-relative 30d with moderate beta.
Solid GDP revision (2.1%), strong regional bank breadth, steady yield curve. Financials show +6.3% relative 30d at high up-day share; benefits from resilient growth and stable rates.

Strongest 30d benchmark-relative (+17.7%) with broad participation (up_day_share 74%) at 52w highs; M&A and financing conditions supportive, though volatile. Limited briefing support beyond price action so sized modestly.
Cash-like ballast given elevated VIX risk, heavy July data calendar (CPI, jobs, FOMC) and stretched semis volatility; preserves capital with positive carry.

portfolio_rationale: Barbell of a high-conviction memory/semiconductor catalyst (Micron earnings confirming supercycle) with defensive and cyclical diversifiers benefiting from solid PMI and GDP, plus T-bill ballast ahead of a heavy July macro calendar.
rationale_summary: Overweight semiconductors on fundamental earnings catalyst, balanced by healthcare/industrials/financials breadth and short-duration cash for downside protection.
